title: Update lichen-oscore for Group OSCORE (RFC 9203) support and E2E dead-drop contexts
description: Extend Context to support group IDs, common contexts for multicast confessions, and per-recipient OSCORE for dead drops. Add key derivation from Ed25519 peer keys. Update tests.
close_reason: Created as child to scope lichen-oscore Group OSCORE (RFC 9203) and dead-drop E2E context support
